description_long: This filing cabinet features a rectangular, boxy structure with a series of horizontal stripes on its exterior, giving it a modern, industrial look. The cabinet has a set of drawers or compartments, visible from the open side, with alternating black and white slats and a green-striped top surface. The sides and back are solid and dark, likely made of metal, providing durability and security. The interior appears to be spacious, with enough room for storing files or documents, and the green-striped surface adds a distinctive visual accent. The cabinet lacks visible handles or label holders, suggesting a minimalist design. Its robust construction and utilitarian style make it suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A modern, striped filing cabinet with a dark exterior, green-striped top, and alternating black and white interior slats. The design is robust and minimalist, ideal for urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: The top view shows a flat, rectangular surface with alternating dark and light horizontal stripes.
description_view_1: The front or open view reveals the green-striped top shelf and the interior with black and white slats, as well as the open compartment.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a solid, dark back panel with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: The side view highlights the green-striped top surface and the depth of the open compartment, with dark side panels.
